title: Simple Clock
description: Adds a clock in the top left, or wherever you specify.
body:
# About Displays a clock at wherever you want on the screen. # Usage This is a [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) mod and requires the [fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). ## Commands
/ccol [hex_color]

Changes the font color of the clock to the specified hex color.

/cpos [x] [y]

Changes the position to the x and y coordinates specified.
